expected_title: Neuropixels recordings in mouse visual system
rationale: Steinmetz et al. 2019 Science paper — Neuropixels recordings across 42 brain regions in mouse during visual discrimination task. Primary dataset at DANDI:000040.
note: dandi:000026 was originally listed but is incorrect (it is a human brain cell census). Correct ID is dandi:000040.

query: Allen Institute Visual Coding Neuropixels Brain Observatory stimulus set
expected_title: Allen Institute - Visual Coding - Neuropixels (Brain Observatory 1.1 Stimulus Set)
rationale: Allen Brain Observatory Neuropixels Visual Coding dataset, Brain Observatory 1.1 stimulus set. Canonical known dataset for visual cortex ephys benchmarking.

query: Allen Institute Visual Coding Neuropixels functional connectivity stimulus
expected_title: Allen Institute - Visual Coding - Neuropixels (Functional Connectivity Stimulus Set)
rationale: Allen Brain Observatory Neuropixels functional connectivity dataset. Companion to ki_0002 with different stimulus design.

query: Allen Institute calcium imaging contrast tuning mouse visual cortex
expected_title: Allen Institute – Contrast tuning in mouse visual cortex with calcium imaging
rationale: Allen Institute two-photon calcium imaging of V1 neurons during contrast tuning. Commonly used benchmark for population coding studies.

query: Allen Institute calcium imaging temporal frequency spatial frequency tuning visual cortex mouse
expected_title: Allen Institute – TF x SF tuning in mouse visual cortex with calcium imaging
rationale: Allen Institute two-photon calcium imaging tuning curves for temporal and spatial frequency in V1.

query: Steinmetz multi-probe Neuropixels mouse visual system additional recordings
expected_title: Milti-probe Neuropixels recordings in mouse visual system (additional data)
rationale: Additional data companion to the Steinmetz 2019 Neuropixels dataset (ki_0001). Multi-probe recordings in mouse visual system.
note: Note typo 'Milti' in corpus title — this is the actual DANDI title.
